problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
